name: Gerewol
traditions: Yaake dance (male beauty contest); elaborate face painting and costumes; lineage songs; young women choose partners; nomadic gathering.
historicalBackground: Gerewol is a unique courtship ritual of the Wodaabe people, a subgroup of the Fulani. Young men compete in beauty and charm to attract wives.
description: The Wodaabe male beauty contest, where elaborately painted young men compete in dance and charm in Niger's Sahel region.
